title: eriocephala schumanniana subsp. claviceps
intro: Eriocephala schumanniana subsp. claviceps is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae and is also known as the Stiff-leafed Copper Tops or Stiff-leafed Copperwire. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eriocephala schumanniana subsp. claviceps include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and prevent infections, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Eriocephala schumanniana subsp. claviceps can be prepared into herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
